Effect: +1 to d6 rolls for wilderness survival tracking and stealth in outdoor environments. Critical hit range expands to 19-20 against beasts.
Notes: Any type. Applies to both Hunter and Caster.

Effect: +1 to melee ATK and DEF when wielding a medium weapon.
Notes: A Caster with Blade Dancer can hold their own against minor threats without spending MP.

Effect: Free counterattack on a natural 19-20 on a defense roll when wielding a single medium sword or a medium sword and dagger.
Restrictions: No medium or heavy armor; no shield.

Effect: +1 ATK with light or medium weapons. +1 to d6 rolls for sailing sea lore and open-water survival.

+1 to d6 rolls for lockpicking sleight of hand stealth climbing and similar roguish tasks. Stealth attacks: max weapon damage + 1d6 (all bypasses AR). STR modifier applied once to total. Can be upgraded through training to +2d6.
Notes: Parallel to Assassin with different skill focus. Combat bonuses do not stack if both taken.

Effect: +1 to d6 rolls for stealth disguise poison preparation and poison handling. Stealth attacks: max weapon damage + 1d6 (all bypasses AR). STR modifier applied once to total. Can be upgraded through training to +2d6.
Notes: Parallel to Thief. Skill bonuses apply to respective tasks; combat bonuses do not stack.

Effect: Heal 1d6 + WIS modifier HP on touch once per day. +1 to d6 rolls for religious lore ceremony and faith-based persuasion.
Notes: A Hunter with this talent is a paladin. A Caster with this talent is a priest who also casts runes.

Effect: Curse once per day: one target suffers -1 to all rolls until they rest (WIS save target 13 resists). +1 to d6 rolls for occult lore and curse identification.
Speak with animals at will (simple communication; animals not compelled). Commune with nature once per day: ask the referee one question about the local natural environment.
+1 ATK and damage with chosen ranged weapon type (bow; firearm; or sling; chosen at creation).
Restrictions: No shield; no heavy armor; no heavy melee weapons.

Effect: +1 to d6 rolls for stealth and concealment in outdoor or elevated positions. Stealth attacks with ranged weapons: max weapon damage + 1d6 (all bypasses AR). AGI modifier applied once to total. Can be upgraded to +2d6. Can engage at extreme range at referee discretion.
Restrictions: No shield; no heavy armor; no heavy melee weapons.

Effect: +1 to d6 rolls for performance deception and reading a crowd. On successful ranged defense vs small thrown weapon: catch and return it (up to 3/round). Once per day reroll any single die that affects you.

Notes: Choosing a magic tradition is a talent. Casters only. Taken at character creation or through significant in-world training.

Effect: CHA replaces WIS for all magic-related rolls. Different rune list emphasizing nature spirits elemental effects and communal magic. Learns new runes by communing with spirits rather than research.
Notes: Shaman is a Caster tradition not a separate type. The spirit does the casting; the Shaman negotiates.

Effect: Magic stored in gadgets rather than cast directly. Gadgets hold specific rune invocations with charges based on MP. Anyone can activate a gadget. No declaration required; no casting time; no interruption risk. Gadgets cannot be swapped mid-expedition.
Notes: Key tradeoff: Artificer avoids all casting risk but carries more items (higher loss exposure). Losing one gadget is manageable; losing a Runebook is catastrophic for standard Casters.
